post.description:
Upload documents hosted on a local file system into a GroundX bucket.

[Supported Document Types and Ingest Capacities](https://docs.eyelevel.ai/documentation/fundamentals/document-types-and-ingest-capacities)

400.description: Invalid document type or source URL

401.description: Unauthorized to update bucket with ID

post.description:
Ingest documents hosted on public URLs into a GroundX bucket.

[Supported Document Types and Ingest Capacities](https://docs.eyelevel.ai/documentation/fundamentals/document-types-and-ingest-capacities)

400.description: Invalid document type or source URL

401.description: Unauthorized to update bucket with given ID

post.description:
Upload the content of a publicly accessible website for ingestion into a GroundX bucket. This is done by following links within a specified URL, recursively, up to a specified depth or number of pages.

Note1: This endpoint is currently not supported for on-prem deployments. 
Note2: The `source_url` must include the protocol, http:// or https://.

[Supported Document Types and Ingest Capacities](https://docs.eyelevel.ai/documentation/fundamentals/document-types-and-ingest-capacities)

401.description: Unauthorized to update bucket with given ID

get.description: Get the current status of an ingest, initiated with documents.ingest_remote, documents.ingest_local, or documents.crawl_website, by specifying the processId (the processId is included in the response of the documents.ingest functions).

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: the processId for the ingest process being checked

401.description: Unauthorized to access process with given ID

delete.description: Cancel an ingest process, along with any files that have not been completely ingested.

parameters.name: processId
parameters.description: the processId for the ingest process to be cancelled

401.description: Unauthorized to access process with given ID

get.description: lookup all documents across all resources which are currently on GroundX

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: The maximum number of returned documents. Accepts 1-100 with a default of 20.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Only documents with names that contain the filter string will be returned in the results.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The document attribute that will be used to sort the results.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: The order in which to sort the results. A value for sort must also be set.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A status filter on the get documents query. If this value is set, then only documents with this status will be returned in the results.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: A token for pagination. If the number of documents for a given query is larger than n, the response will include a "nextToken" value. That token can be included in this field to retrieve the next batch of n documents.

delete.description: Delete multiple documents hosted on GroundX

parameters.name: documentIds
parameters.description: A list of documentIds which correspond to documents ingested by GroundX

200.description: Documents are queued to be deleted

401.description: Unauthorized to delete document with given ID

get.description: Look up an existing document by documentId.

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: The documentId of the document for which GroundX information will be provided.

401.description: Unauthorized to access document with given ID

delete.description: Delete a single document hosted on GroundX

parameters.name: documentId
parameters.description: A documentId which correspond to a document ingested by GroundX

401.description: Unauthorized to delete document with given ID

get.description: lookup the document(s) associated with a processId, bucketId, or groupId.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: a processId, bucketId, or groupId

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: The maximum number of returned documents. Accepts 1-100 with a default of 20.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Only documents with names that contain the filter string will be returned in the results.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The document attribute that will be used to sort the results.

parameters.name: sortOrder
parameters.description: The order in which to sort the results. A value for sort must also be set.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A status filter on the get documents query. If this value is set, then only documents with this status will be returned in the results.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: A token for pagination. If the number of documents for a given query is larger than n, the response will include a "nextToken" value. That token can be included in this field to retrieve the next batch of n documents.

400.description: Invalid process, bucket, or group ID

401.description: Unauthorized to access process, bucket, or group with given ID

get.description: Get a list of ingest process requests, sorted from most recent to least.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: The maximum number of returned processes. Accepts 1-100 with a default of 20.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A status filter on the processing status. If this value is set, then only processes with this status will be returned in the results.

post.description:
Search documents on GroundX for the most relevant information to a given query.
The result of this query is typically used in one of two ways; `result.search.text` can be used to provide context to a language model, facilitating RAG, or `result.search.results` can be used to observe chunks of text which are relevant to the query, facilitating citation.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The bucketId, groupId, or documentId to be searched. The document or documents within the specified container will be compared to the query, and relevant information will be extracted.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: The maximum number of returned search results. Accepts 1-100 with a default of 20.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: A token for pagination. If the number of search results for a given query is larger than n, the response will include a "nextToken" value. That token can be included in this field to retrieve the next batch of n search results.

parameters.name: verbosity
parameters.description: The amount of data returned with each search result. 0 == no search results, only the recommended context. 1 == search results but no searchData. 2 == search results and searchData.

401.description: Unauthorized to access resource with given ID

post.description:
Search documents on GroundX for the most relevant information to a given query by documentId(s).
The result of this query is typically used in one of two ways; `result.search.text` can be used to provide context to a language model, facilitating RAG, or `result.search.results` can be used to observe chunks of text which are relevant to the query, facilitating citation.

parameters.name: n
parameters.description: The maximum number of returned search results. Accepts 1-100 with a default of 20.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: A token for pagination. If the number of search results for a given query is larger than n, the response will include a "nextToken" value. That token can be included in this field to retrieve the next batch of n search results.

parameters.name: verbosity
parameters.description: The amount of data returned with each search result. 0 == no search results, only the recommended context. 1 == search results but no searchData. 2 == search results and searchData.

401.description: Unauthorized to access resource with given ID

get.description: list all groups within your GroundX account.

post.description: Add an existing bucket to an existing group. Buckets and groups can be associated many to many.

parameters.description: The groupId of the group which the bucket will be added to.

parameters.description: The bucketId of the bucket being added to the group.

delete.description: remove a bucket from a group. Buckets and groups can be associated many to many, this removes one bucket to group association without disturbing others.

parameters.description: The bucketId of the bucket which will be removed from the group.

post.description:
Integrate with GroundX via the MCP protocol. Currently requires an Enterprise subscription.

This endpoint can be accessed at either `/api/v1/mcp` or `/mcp`.

get.description: Get all workflows associated with the API key.
Get the workflow associated with customer account.

post.description: Assigns the given workflow to the customer account and is applied by default to all files unless overridden by document or bucket workflows.

delete.description: Removes the assigned workflow from the customer account.

post.description: Assigns the given workflow to the group or bucket and is applied by default to all files unless overridden by document workflows.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the group or bucket that the workflow will be assigned to.

delete.description: Removes the assigned workflow from the customer account.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the group or bucket that the workflow will removed from.

get.description: look up a specific workflow by groupId, bucketId, or workflowId.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The id of the group, bucket, or workflow to look up.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The workflowId of the workflow being updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The workflowId of the workflow being deleted.

get.description: Get the account information associated with the API key.
List all API keys within your GroundX account

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key being updated.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key being deleted.

get.description: List the current health status of all services. Statuses update every 5 minutes.
Look up the current health status of a specific service. Statuses update every 5 minutes.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The name of the service to look up.

DocumentType.description: The type of document (one of the currently supported file types)
DocumentType.title: DocumentType

IngestLocalDocumentMetadataFilter.description: A dictionary of key-value pairs that can be used to pre-filter documents prior to a search.
IngestLocalDocumentMetadataFilter.title: IngestLocalDocumentMetadataFilter

ProcessLevel.description: The amount of processing of document chunks to perform. 'none' specifies the document to go through only text extraction and chunking. Documents uploaded with 'full' go through text extraction, chunking, and an agentic process that creates robust metadata for each chunk. (default 'full').
ProcessLevel.title: ProcessLevel
